hero.headline: Professional cleaning for your home, office and car
hero.subhead: Upholstery, carpets, rugs, car interiors and in-house hygiene in El Masnou and Barcelona. Fast, reliable and eco-friendly.

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: We bring professional cleaning to your home or business.

upholstery.title: Upholstery cleaning
upholstery.description: Sofas, armchairs and fabric furniture. We remove stains, odours and allergens with safe, effective methods.

carpet.title: Carpet cleaning
carpet.description: Deep cleaning for carpets and rugs. Restore colour and freshness with our professional equipment.

rug.title: Rug cleaning
rug.description: Care for delicate and large rugs. We treat each piece according to its material and finish.

car.title: Car interior cleaning
car.description: Seats, trim and upholstery. Leave your car interior clean and odour-free.

ozone.title: Ozone therapy
ozone.description: Targeted ozone treatment to eliminate persistent odours, bacteria and airborne contaminants.

facade.title: Facade cleaning with pressure washer
facade.description: Deep exterior wall cleaning for homes and businesses, removing dirt, mould and pollution marks.

detailing.title: Car interior cleaning and detailing
detailing.description: Deep interior detailing for dashboard, upholstery, carpets and odour elimination.

commercialCarpet.title: Commercial carpet cleaning
commercialCarpet.description: Professional carpet cleaning for offices and retail spaces with eco-friendly products.

process.title: How our service works?
process.subtitle: Booking and cleaning in three simple steps.

step1.title: Book
step1.description: Contact us via WhatsApp. We agree the service and a time that suits you.

step2.title: We come
step2.description: We arrive at your home or location with our equipment. No need to move furniture.

step3.title: Enjoy
step3.description: We clean thoroughly and leave everything tidy. Quick drying so you can use the space again soon.

gallery.title: Examples of our work
gallery.subtitle: See the before and after of our work. Real results that speak for themselves.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by residents and businesses in Barcelona and the Maresme.

areas.title: Service areas
areas.subtitle: We serve El Masnou, Barcelona and the surrounding area.
areas.list: El Masnou, Barcelona, Premià de Mar, Vilassar de Mar, Montgat, Badalona, Sant Adrià, and other towns in the Maresme and Barcelonès.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How much does sofa cleaning cost?
faq.a1: The price depends on the size and condition of the sofa. Contact us for a free, no-obligation quote.
faq.q2: How long does it take to dry after cleaning?
faq.a2: Usually between 4 and 8 hours, depending on ventilation and fabric. We use methods that speed up drying.
faq.q3: Are the products safe for children and pets?
faq.a3: Yes. We use professional products that are safe for the home and the environment.
faq.q4: Do you also clean car interiors?
faq.a4: Yes. We offer car interior cleaning: seats, trim and upholstery. Ask for a quote.

facadeCleaning.title: Facade Cleaning with Pressure Washer
facadeCleaning.intro: We remove dirt, mould, lichen and pollution marks from exterior walls with controlled pressure and material-safe methods.
facadeCleaning.whatWeClean1: Brick, stone, concrete, wood and composite facades in good condition.
facadeCleaning.whatWeClean2: Entrances, pillars, railings and decorative exterior details.
facadeCleaning.whatWeClean3: Areas affected by humidity, algae or water stains.
facadeCleaning.benefit1: Improves the appearance and image of your property.
facadeCleaning.benefit3: Safe, professional process with protection for nearby elements.
